name: grace_full_lifecycle_clean_expiry
description: Warm day. Sensor opens at 13:00 (pause). Sensor closes at 13:10 (grace starts, 5-min grace). Sensor stays closed. Grace expires at 13:15 with all sensors closed â†’ automation resumes cleanly. Classification cycle at 13:30 applies normally.
notes: Tests the normal (clean) grace expiry path: pause â†’ sensor closes â†’ grace expires cleanly â†’ classification resumes.
Gap 2 (grace expiry re-check) is pending in simulate.py, but the CLEAN expiry path already works:
- grace_end event clears grace_active; no sensors open; no re-pause.
- The next classification event applies normally since paused_by_door=False after resumed.
All assertions in this scenario are logic-track â€” no Gap 2 required for the clean path.
Contrast with grace_full_lifecycle_sensor_still_open.json which tests the re-pause path.

events.note: Hot afternoon. Outdoor too warm for nat vent.
Door opens. Nat vent ineligible (outdoor too warm). Automation pauses.
Door closes. All sensors closed â†’ automation resumes, grace period begins (5 min).
Grace period marker: grace_active=True. Sensor stays closed through grace window.
Grace expires at 13:15. All sensors are still closed â†’ clean expiry, no re-pause.
30-min classification cycle. Grace is gone, no sensors open â€” classification applies normally.

assertions.reason: Sensor opens with outdoor (88F) > indoor (76F) â€” nat vent ineligible. Automation pauses.
All sensors closed â€” automation resumes. Grace period begins.
Grace expired cleanly (sensors stayed closed). Classification cycle at 13:30 applies normally: warm day, cool mode, comfort_cool=74F.

verdict.summary: Grace period expires cleanly when sensors stay closed; classification resumes normally
verdict.observed_behavior: paused (13:00) â†’ resumed (13:10) â†’ grace expires cleanly (13:15) â†’ classification_applied (13:30, 74F)
verdict.expected_behavior: When no sensor opens during the grace window, automation resumes without re-pause after grace expires
